Title: Successful user login with existing token
Preconditions:
- User has a valid token stored locally.
- Firebase Authentication service is operational.
Test Steps:
1. Main process calls `getToken()` on LocalUser.
2. LocalUser returns the stored token (`"abc123xyz456"`).
3. LocalUser sends the token to Authentication service via `request(token)`.
4. Authentication verifies the token and returns `status = "SUCCESS"`.
5. Authentication requests user data (`dati utente`).
6. LocalUser creates a new `LocalUser` instance with fetched data.
7. Authentication sends `"done"` confirmation.
Expected Result:
- LocalUser instance is created successfully.
- User is logged in with access to all authenticated features.
- No error messages or crashes.

Title: Failed login with invalid token
Preconditions:
- User has an invalid/expired token stored locally.
- Firebase Authentication service is operational.
Test Steps:
1. Main process calls `getToken()` on LocalUser.
2. LocalUser returns the invalid token (`"invalidtoken123"`).
3. LocalUser sends the token to Authentication service via `request(token)`.
4. Authentication rejects the token and returns `status = "FAILURE"`.
5. LocalUser does **not** create a new `LocalUser` instance.
Expected Result:
- Authentication process fails gracefully.
- User remains unauthenticated; no crash or data leakage.
- System prompts user to re-authenticate (e.g., login screen).

Title: New user registration and login
Preconditions:
- Firebase Authentication service is operational.
- No existing user with email `"newuser@example.com"`.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to **Home** page (Page 2).
2. User clicks "Register" (triggering `createUserWithEmailAndPassword`).
3. Authentication service creates a new user and returns `status = "SUCCESS"`.
4. Main process calls `getToken()`; LocalUser receives a new valid token.
5. LocalUser sends token to Authentication for verification.
6. Authentication returns `status = "SUCCESS"` and user data.
7. LocalUser creates a new `LocalUser` instance.
Expected Result:
- New user account is created in Firebase.
- User is logged in automatically.
- Shared Preferences (Page 2) stores the token for future sessions.

Title: Password change for authenticated user
Preconditions:
- User is logged in (`currentUser` exists in Authentication).
- Old password: `"OldPass123"`; New password: `"NewPass456!"`.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to **Settings** (via Home or Diary page).
2. User enters old password (`"OldPass123"`) and new password (`"NewPass456!"`).
3. Authentication service calls `updatePassword("OldPass123", "NewPass456!")`.
4. Authentication returns `status = "SUCCESS"`.
5. User logs out (`signOut`) and logs back in with the new password.
Expected Result:
- Password is updated in Firebase.
- User can log in with the new password.
- Old password is rejected on subsequent login attempts.

Title: Logout and token clearance
Preconditions: - User is logged in with a valid token.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks "Logout" (triggering `signOut`).
2. Authentication service clears `currentUser` and invalidates the token.
3. Main process calls `getToken()`; LocalUser returns `null`.
4. LocalUser does not attempt to send a token to Authentication.
5. User navigates to **Home** page; system redirects to login screen.
Expected Result:
- User is logged out successfully.
- No token is stored in Shared Preferences.
- All authenticated features (e.g., Diary, Plant Analysis) are inaccessible.

Title: Successful plant insertion via camera and AI analysis
Preconditions:
- User is logged in.
- Camera permission is granted.
- Firebase Storage and Gemini AI API are operational.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to **Camera** page (Page 2).
2. User takes a photo of a plant and clicks "Analyze."
3. Main sends `newFoto + "richiesta specie pianta nella foto"` to Gemini AI API.
4. Gemini AI API identifies the plant as `"Rose"` and sends response to Firebase Storage.
5. Firebase Storage inserts `"Rose"` into storage and confirms insertion.
6. Firebase Storage uploads `plant_sample.jpg` to user’s personal folder (e.g., `users/user123/rose/plant_sample.jpg`).
7. Firebase Storage returns download URL: `"https://storage.example.com/users/user123/rose/plant_sample.jpg"`.
Expected Result:
- Plant species (`"Rose"`) is stored in the database.
- Image is uploaded to the correct folder with metadata.
- Download URL is displayed in the **Diary** or **Plant Analysis** page.
- User sees confirmation: `"Pianta aggiunta: Rose"`.

Title: Failed plant insertion due to AI API error
Preconditions:
- User is logged in.
- Camera permission is granted.
- Gemini AI API is **unavailable** (simulated).
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to **Camera** page and takes a photo.
2. Main sends request to Gemini AI API; API returns `error = "SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE"`.
3. Main does not proceed with Firebase Storage operations.
4. User sees error message: `"Impossibile identificare la pianta. Riprova più tardi."`.
Expected Result:
- No data is stored in Firebase Storage.
- Image is **not** uploaded.
- User can retry or cancel the operation.

Title: Manual plant insertion (without AI)
Preconditions:
- User is logged in.
- User has manually selected a plant species (e.g., via dropdown).
Test Data:
- Plant name: `"Sunflower"`
- Image: `sunflower.jpg` (previously uploaded to user’s storage).
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to **Inserimento/Modifica Piante** (Page 1).
2. User selects `"Sunflower"` from a dropdown list.
3. User uploads `sunflower.jpg` from local storage.
4. DataManager validates input and stores:
   - Species: `"Sunflower"`
   - Image URL: `"https://storage.example.com/users/user123/sunflower/sunflower.jpg"`
5. User confirms insertion.
Expected Result:
- Plant is added to the database with correct metadata.
- Image is linked to the plant record.
- User sees confirmation: `"Pianta aggiunta: Sunflower"`.

Title: Plant modification (update species name)
Preconditions:
- User has a stored plant: `"Lily"` with image `lily.jpg`.
- User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to **Lettura Piante** (Page 1) and selects `"Lily"`.
2. User clicks "Modifica" and changes species to `"Tiger Lily"`.
3. DataManager updates the record in Firebase Storage.
4. Main requests updated plant data from Firebase Storage.
5. Firebase Storage returns the modified record with new species name.
Expected Result:
- Plant species is updated to `"Tiger Lily"` in the database.
- Image URL remains unchanged.
- User sees confirmation: `"Pianta aggiornata: Tiger Lily"`.

Title: Plant deletion
Preconditions:
- User has a stored plant: `"Fern"` with image `fern.jpg`.
- User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to **Lettura Piante** and selects `"Fern"`.
2. User clicks "Elimina."
3. DataManager deletes the plant record from Firebase Storage.
4. Main requests updated plant list from Firebase Storage.
5. Firebase Storage confirms deletion and returns the updated list (excluding `"Fern"`).
Expected Result:
- Plant record and associated image are deleted from storage.
- Plant no longer appears in **Lettura Piante** or **Diario**.
- User sees confirmation: `"Pianta eliminata: Fern"`.

Title: Successful diary entry creation
Preconditions:
- User is logged in.
- User has at least one stored plant (e.g., `"Rose"`).
Test Data:
- Diary entry: `"Pruned rose today. Added fertilizer."`
- Date: `"2023-10-15"`
- Associated plant: `"Rose"`
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to **Diario** page (Page 2).
2. User selects `"Rose"` from the plant dropdown.
3. User enters text: `"Pruned rose today. Added fertilizer."` and sets date.
4. DataManager stores the entry in Firebase Storage under user’s diary.
5. User confirms submission.
Expected Result:
- Diary entry is saved with:
  - Text: `"Pruned rose today. Added fertilizer."`
  - Date: `"2023-10-15"`
  - Plant: `"Rose"`
- Entry appears in **Lettura Diario** (Page 1).
- User sees confirmation: `"Appunto salvato"`.

Title: Diary entry modification
Preconditions:
- User has a diary entry: `"Watered plants."` (created on `"2023-10-14"`).
- User is logged in.
Test Data:
- Old entry: `"Watered plants."`
- New entry: `"Watered plants. Added mulch."`
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to **Lettura Diario** and selects the entry.
2. User clicks "Modifica" and updates the text.
3. DataManager updates the entry in Firebase Storage.
4. User confirms changes.
Expected Result:
- Diary entry is updated to `"Watered plants. Added mulch."`.
- Date remains `"2023-10-14"`.
- Updated entry appears in the list.
- User sees confirmation: `"Appunto aggiornato"`.

Title: Diary entry deletion
Preconditions:
- User has a diary entry: `"Test entry."` (created on `"2023-10-13"`).
- User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to **Lettura Diario** and selects the entry.
2. User clicks "Elimina."
3. DataManager deletes the entry from Firebase Storage.
4. User confirms deletion.
